fault_reports.symptom_text_hindi: Break dabaane par dhum-dhum lag raha hai aur pedal dhas raha hai
fault_reports.symptom_text_english: Thudding when pressing brakes and the pedal is sinking
fault_reports.diagnosis: Front Brake Pads completely worn down to the backing plate, caliper seals leaking fluid.
fault_reports.recommended_action: Change front brake pads, replace caliper seal kits, bleed brake system.
fault_reports.agent_trace_json: {"SupervisorAgent":{"log":"Routing brake failure symptom to Triage and Maintenance specialists."},"DiagnosticAgent":{"log":"Matched symptom with knowledge base kb_02 (brake squealing and pedal vibration). High confidence."},"TriageAgent":{"log":"Braking fluid pressure dropping. Setting severity to STOP_IMMEDIATELY."},"MaintenanceAgent":{"log":"Estimated cost ₹4,500 - ₹9,500. Directing to Sanjay Gandhi Hub SC (sc_01)."}}

fault_reports.symptom_text_hindi: Engine se kharkhar aawaz aa rahi hai thodi speed badhne pe
fault_reports.symptom_text_english: Rattling noise from the engine when speed increases slightly
fault_reports.diagnosis: Loose heat shield clamp vibrating near exhaust manifold and turbo joint.
fault_reports.recommended_action: Tighten heat shield clamping bolts and inspect exhaust mounting rubber.
fault_reports.agent_trace_json: {"SupervisorAgent":{"log":"Identified accessory rattle."},"DiagnosticAgent":{"log":"Non-critical tapping. Matches kb_36 (exhaust rattling)."},"TriageAgent":{"log":"Safe to drive to dispatch point. Severity: CAUTION."},"MaintenanceAgent":{"log":"Estimate ₹800. Simple bolt fastening."}}

fault_reports.symptom_text_hindi: Dashboard par check engine aur low oil lights aa gayi hai
fault_reports.symptom_text_english: Check engine and low oil indicators are on the dashboard
fault_reports.diagnosis: Severe engine lubrication depletion. Oil level is below minimum marker. Possible oil sump gasket leak.
fault_reports.recommended_action: Do not drive. Check engine oil level using dipstick. If empty, inspect sump. Top up with 15W-40 truck oil immediately.
fault_reports.agent_trace_json: {"SupervisorAgent":{"log":"Routing critical warning dashboard light."},"DiagnosticAgent":{"log":"Engine running dry leads to catastrophic piston seizure. Matches kb_15 partially."},"TriageAgent":{"log":"Absolute safety hazard. Severity: STOP_IMMEDIATELY."},"MaintenanceAgent":{"log":"Sump gaskets and fresh oil required."}}

fault_reports.symptom_text_hindi: Gear badalne me thoda dubaav lag raha hai, clutch dheela hai
fault_reports.symptom_text_english: Difficulty shifting gears, clutch pedal feels loose and spongy
fault_reports.diagnosis: Clutch master cylinder fluid leak. Air trapped in hydraulic clutch actuation loop.
fault_reports.recommended_action: Refill clutch fluid DOT-4 reservoir, inspect secondary hose lines, bleed master cylinder.
fault_reports.agent_trace_json: {"SupervisorAgent":{"log":"Symptom mapped to clutch actuation hydraulic loop."},"DiagnosticAgent":{"log":"Matches kb_06 (clutch master cylinder leak). Moderate confidence."},"TriageAgent":{"log":"Vehicle can drive with rev-matching or cautious single-gear crawl. Severity: CAUTION."},"MaintenanceAgent":{"log":"Estimate ₹2,500. Hydraulic seal repair."}}

fault_reports.symptom_text_hindi: Socks aur steering me thartharahat ho rahi hai NH-44 pe daudte waqt
fault_reports.symptom_text_english: Vibrations in suspension and steering when cruising on NH-44
fault_reports.diagnosis: Front wheel dynamic imbalance or slightly bent wheel rim from impact.
fault_reports.recommended_action: Perform wheel balancing and wheel alignment. Inspect front steel rims for oval deflection.
fault_reports.agent_trace_json: {"SupervisorAgent":{"log":"Routing steering wheel instability."},"DiagnosticAgent":{"log":"Matches kb_13 (front tire alignment/imbalance). High confidence."},"TriageAgent":{"log":"Safe to drive at moderate speed. Severity: DRIVE."},"MaintenanceAgent":{"log":"Wheel balancing. Directing to sc_09 (Vijayawada)."}}

fault_reports.symptom_text_hindi: Gaadi ka engine band ho raha hai baar baar, thoda kaala dhua bhi aa raha hai
fault_reports.symptom_text_english: The engine stalls repeatedly, and some black smoke is coming out
fault_reports.diagnosis: Common Rail Fuel Injector solenoid failure. Blocked injector nozzle in cylinder 3.
fault_reports.recommended_action: Inspect fuel injector nozzles, flush the common rail fuel delivery system, replace fuel filter.
fault_reports.agent_trace_json: {"SupervisorAgent":{"log":"Analyzing fuel rail pressure drop."},"DiagnosticAgent":{"log":"Corresponds directly to common rail fuel injector blockage (kb_01)."},"TriageAgent":{"log":"Risk of engine cylinder damage. Severity: STOP_IMMEDIATELY."},"MaintenanceAgent":{"log":"Common rail cleaning required. Estimate ₹12,000."}}

fault_reports.symptom_text_hindi: Engine jhatka le raha hai aur black smoke silencer se aa raha hai
fault_reports.symptom_text_english: Engine is jerking and black smoke is coming from the silencer
fault_reports.diagnosis: Fuel injector nozzle wear in cylinder 1 and 2, causing incomplete combustion.
fault_reports.recommended_action: Change fuel filter, perform injector nozzle cleaning, test fuel common rail pressure.
fault_reports.agent_trace_json: {"SupervisorAgent":{"log":"Routing exhaust smoke anomaly."},"DiagnosticAgent":{"log":"Matches kb_01 (injector clogging). High confidence."},"TriageAgent":{"log":"Urgent. Severity: STOP_IMMEDIATELY."},"MaintenanceAgent":{"log":"Injectors require testing on Bosch calibration bench."}}

fault_reports.diagnosis: इंजन अत्यधिक गर्म (Overheat) होना - रेडिएटर लीक या थर्मास्टेट वाल्व जाम (Radiator leak / Thermostat failure)
fault_reports.recommended_action:
1. गाड़ी तुरंत किनारे लगाएं।
2. गरम रेडिएटर कैप को कभी भी न खोलें (गंभीर रूप से जलने का खतरा)।
3. इंजन को 30 मिनट ठंडा होने दें, फिर साफ़ पानी या कूलेंट डालें और लीक की जांच करें।
fault_reports.agent_trace_json: {"SupervisorAgent":"Local RAG Supervisor routed to heavy drivetrain diagnostics.","DiagnosticAgent":"Identified match with fault model kb_05 based on keywords and acoustical pattern of \"normal\".","TriageAgent":"Matched severity category: STOP_IMMEDIATELY. fleet_alerts.pattern_description: Fuel System Issues (Fuel Injector failures / Black smoke) detected on multiple Tata Signa/Prima vehicles within a 24-hour window. Possible adulterated diesel batch at NH-44 fueling hub.
